label: Fast
desc: Quick chat. Brief reasoning, but a full (untruncated) answer.

label: Deep reasoning
desc: Slow, thorough. Full reasoning + multi-sample. For hard work.

_NOTE: copy this file to <data_dir>/profiles.json (default eris_data/profiles.json) and edit. The two below are examples for when you pull those models.

label: Coder
desc: Code-focused model. Loads on first use.

label: Max-brain (35B)
desc: Smartest, slowest. Served via llama-server/vLLM; loads on first use.
